message:
refactor(demo_showcase): improve scene module structure and snapshots

Scene Module Improvements:
- json_scene.rs: Refactor JSON rendering with cleaner API
- markdown_scene.rs: Improve markdown rendering structure
- syntax_scene.rs: Clean up syntax highlighting flow
- pager.rs: Improve pager state management
- wizard.rs: Refactor wizard step handling

Snapshot Updates:
- Update scene_list snapshot to reflect current scene ordering
- Ensure snapshot determinism with fixed seeds

These changes improve code organization and maintainability
of the demo showcase scenes without changing functionality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
